title: rectomitra tuberculata
side_effects: Rectomitra tuberculata can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach pain in individuals who consume it in excessive amounts or without proper guidance. Prolonged exposure to its extracts has also been linked to kidney damage and liver strain in some cases. In addition, topical application of its extracts can cause skin irritation, including redness, itching, and rashes, particularly among those with sensitive skin. Furthermore, improper use of the plant can also lead to allergic reactions, including anaphylaxis in severe cases.
